ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, community college) */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the institution */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members in the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the cohort belongs to */,
  "cohort_year" INTEGER /* Year the cohort started */,
  "cohort_size" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the cohort */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the cohort is associated with */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate, doctoral) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the program in years */,
  "cohort_start_date" TEXT /* Date the cohort started */,
  "cohort_end_date" TEXT /* Date the cohort is expected to end */,
  "cohort_description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohorts_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the student belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the student */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the student (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "financial_aid_status" TEXT /* Financial aid status of the student (e.g., Pell Grant, Subsidized Stafford Loan) */,
  "program_completion_status" TEXT /* Program completion status of the student (e.g., completed in 4 years or less, completed in more than 4 years) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the cohort */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student graduated (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the student's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_status" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the enrollment record belongs to */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the cohort for that year */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "enrollment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for enrollment (e.g., new, returning) */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., enrolled, withdrawn) */,
  "enrollment_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last enrollment status change */,
  "enrollment_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the last enrollment status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_status_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the graduation record belongs to */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "graduated_students" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated from the cohort for that year */,
  "graduation_type" TEXT /* Type of graduation (e.g., on-time, delayed) */,
  "graduation_gpa" REAL /* GPA at the time of graduation */,
  "graduation_award" TEXT /* Any awards or honors received at graduation */,
  "graduation_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the graduation ceremony */,
  "graduation_ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the graduation ceremony */,
  "graduation_status" TEXT /* Final graduation status (e.g., graduated, did not graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclusion record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the exclusion record belongs to */,
  "exclusion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for exclusion (e.g., deceased, permanently disabled) */,
  "excluded_students" INTEGER /* Number of students excluded from the cohort for that reason */,
  "exclusion_date" TEXT /* Date of the exclusion */,
  "exclusion_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the exclusion */,
  "exclusion_effective_date" TEXT /* Date the exclusion became effective */,
  "exclusion_end_date" TEXT /* Date the exclusion ends (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exclusions_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)
